languages.text: "Вы слышали?! Служба династии фон Валанциус, сулит нам новые подвиги!" {n}Крики Дунавски эхом звучат меж утлых построек. Люди смотрят на вас, не скрывая восхищения.{/n}
"Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вы слышали?! Служба династии фон Валанциус, сулит нам новые подвиги!" {n}Крики Дунавски эхом звучат меж утлых построек. Люди смотрят на вас, не скрывая восхищения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes among the frail buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

"Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

languages.text: “大家听到了吗？为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝效力，能让我们立下新的光辉功绩！”{n}杜纳芙斯卡的声音在破败的建筑物间回荡。众人的目光转向你，流露出毫不掩饰的钦佩。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “大家听到了吗？为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝效力，能让我们立下新的光辉功绩！”{n}杜纳芙斯卡的声音在破败的建筑物间回荡。众人的目光转向你，流露出毫不掩饰的钦佩。{/n}

languages.text: "Duydunuz mu? Von Valancius hanedanlığına hizmet etmek, bize yepyeni zaferler vadediyor!" {n}Dunawski'nin sesi, derme çatma binaların arasında yankılanıyor. Gözler açık bir hayranlıkla sana dönüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Duydunuz mu? Von Valancius hanedanlığına hizmet etmek, bize yepyeni zaferler vadediyor!" {n}Dunawski'nin sesi, derme çatma binaların arasında yankılanıyor. Gözler açık bir hayranlıkla sana dönüyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Vous avez entendu ça ? La gloire attend ceux qui servent la dynastie von Valancius ! » {n}La voix de Dunawski résonne entre les bâtiments en ruine. Les regards sont braqués sur vous, remplis d'admiration.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez entendu ça ? « La gloire attend ceux qui servent la dynastie von Valancius ! » {n}La voix de Dunawski résonne entre les bâtiments en ruine. Les regards sont braqués sur vous, remplis d'admiration.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Han oído eso? ¡Servir a la dinastía von Valancius promete proezas gloriosas!». {n}La voz de Dunawski resuena entre los edificios destartalados. Los ojos de todos se centran en ti, llenos de admiración.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Han oído eso? ¡Servir a la dinastía von Valancius promete proezas gloriosas!». {n}La voz de Dunawski resuena entre los edificios destartalados. Los ojos de todos se centran en ti, llenos de admiración.{/n}

languages.text: "Habt ihr das gehört? Der Dienst für die Dynastie derer von Valancius verspricht uns neuen Ruhm!" {n}Dunawskis Stimme hallt von den maroden Gebäuden wider. Alle Augen richten sich voller Bewunderung auf dich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Habt ihr das gehört? Der Dienst für die Dynastie derer von Valancius verspricht uns neuen Ruhm!" {n}Dunawskis Stimme hallt von den maroden Gebäuden wider. Alle Augen richten sich voller Bewunderung auf dich.{/n}

languages.text: 「聞いたか？ フォン・ヴァランシウス王朝に仕えれば、新たな栄光の偉業が約束されるのだ！」{n}ドゥナフスキーの声が、おんぼろの建物のあいだに響き渡る。視線があなたに集まり、その目は、あからさまな賞賛に満ちている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「聞いたか？ フォン・ヴァランシウス王朝に仕えれば、新たな栄光の偉業が約束されるのだ！」{n}ドゥナフスキーの声が、おんぼろの建物のあいだに響き渡る。視線があなたに集まり、その目は、あからさまな賞賛に満ちている。{/n}
